category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Wassette as a security-oriented runtime for WebAssembly Components via MCP.
source_facts.description says Wassette is a security-oriented runtime that runs WebAssembly Components via MCP.
display_name_sources: Official repository title is microsoft/wassette and README uses Wassette.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for microsoft/wassette.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/microsoft/wassette; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official Microsoft repository and blog describe isolated sandbox execution for agent tools.
source_facts.description identifies WebAssembly Components, MCP, and security-oriented runtime behavior.
